allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('async-storage in deps:', !!p.dependencies['@react-native-async-storage/async-storage'], '| version:', p.dependencies['@react-native-async-storage/async-storage']\); console.log\('firebase version:', p.dependencies.firebase\);")
